code: import{collection,addDoc,serverTimestamp}from"firebase/firestore";import{db,auth}from"../firebase";export async function logAudit(action){let details=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};try{const user=auth.currentUser;await addDoc(collection(db,"auditLog"),{action,details,userEmail:(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.email)||"unknown",userId:(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.uid)||"unknown",timestamp:serverTimestamp()});}catch(err){console.error("Audit log failed:",err);}}
